data.title: Ecommerce Trends: Why furniture sales are tough in 2025 — even at top Housewares & Home Furnishings retailers
data.description: Interest rates, the housing market and tariffs are all on retailers' minds as they look to boost online furniture sales.

data.title: Marketplace services provider Mirakl notches $11.2 billion in annual GMV
data.description: More than 30 clients surpassed $100 million in GMV through the platform. New clients include Nordstrom, JB HiFi, Castorama, and Henry Schein.

data.title: ChemPoint launches a new digital platform for food and personal care sourcing
data.description: IngredientPoint seeks to give industry professionals a competitive edge by offering real-time market analysis and product recommendations.

data.title: Grove Collaborative acquires 8Greens, shares Q4 earnings results
data.description: The 8Greens acquisition accompanied Grove's return to revenue growth in its most recent quarter.

data.title: Kroger creates new ecommerce business unit, names CIO as its leader
data.description: Yael Cosset will head Kroger's new ecommerce unit as the grocer centralizes operations at crucial time.
